generated_from: Official Disney resort recreation pages summarized from user-provided source research.

facts.location_label: Community Hall - Bay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort
facts.description: Community Hall at Bay Lake Tower offers complimentary recreation including a pool table, ping-pong, video games, board games, DVDs and more.
evidence_lines: Bay Lake Tower at Disney's Contemporary Resort — Community Hall
Complimentary pool table, ping-pong, video games, board games, DVDs and more.
Basketball rental and tennis/pickleball equipment can be checked out from Community Hall.

facts.description: Ferris W. Eahlers Community Hall offers complimentary games, arts and crafts, DVDs and more.
evidence_lines: Disney's BoardWalk Villas — Ferris W. Eahlers Community Hall
Complimentary games, arts and crafts, DVDs and more.
Tennis/pickleball racquets and balls are available from Community Hall.

facts.description: Conch Flats Community Hall offers foosball, pool, video games, ping-pong, shuffleboard, crafts, DVDs and equipment checkout.
evidence_lines: Disney's Old Key West Resort — Conch Flats Community Hall
Foosball, pool, video games, ping-pong, shuffleboard, crafts, DVDs, plus checkout equipment for tennis, basketball and volleyball.

facts.description: Community Hall offers ping-pong, foosball, arts and crafts, video games, DVDs, board games and equipment checkout.
evidence_lines: Disney's Saratoga Springs Resort & Spa — Community Hall
Ping-pong, foosball, arts and crafts, video games, DVDs, board games; checkout basketballs, tennis/shuffleboard equipment and grilling tools.

facts.location_label: Community Hall - Animal Kingdom Lodge - Kidani Village
facts.description: Community Hall at Kidani Village offers video games, billiards, arts and crafts, plus sign-out grilling tools and sporting equipment.
evidence_lines: Disney's Animal Kingdom Villas - Kidani Village — Community Hall
Video games, billiards, arts and crafts.
Sign-out grilling tools and sporting equipment including tennis racquets, basketballs and shuffleboard accessories.
Community Hall equipment checkout for Kidani basketball, tennis and pickleball.
